title: kengia thoroldii
intro: Kengia thoroldii is a type of plant, also known as 'Desert Rose', that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kengia thoroldii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
